subcodes.first_line: This is a day when the horizon of the world is illumined and radiant with the lights of the Sun of Manifestation, yet the birds of night turn away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز روزیست که افق عالم بانوار آفتاب ظهور منور و روشن ولکن طیور لیل از آن
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @justice and wrath of God
